title: Ropeworks
description: Adds all of the ropes, chains, tinsel and bunting you need for your builds! Keeping it ropey!
body:
_A ship can't ship without its rigging, nor does a tourney make without flags and bunting!  If you've ever missed having some ropes and chains or some pennants at your disposal, then look no further!_

Ropeworks is designed to augment builds with additional detailing and comes initially with 

4 thicknesses of Rope Anchors
3 thicknesses of Chain Anchors
1 Cable Anchor
1 Tinsel Anchor (9 colours)
1 Bunting Anchor (7 sets)

Chains, rope and cable can be tightened with their sag modifier shift+right click with the rope tool on their origin anchor 
Tinsel can be recoloured by right-clicking with an open hand on the origin anchor
Bunting sets can be changed by shift+right clicking with the rope tool on their origin anchor

Anchors of all types can be placed on any block face and will remain if the block behind them is removed, giving greater options for creativity.  Multiple ropes/chains, etc., can be linked to 1 anchor.

**ROPEWORKS IS AN ENTITY-BASED MOD.** Please bear this in mind when adding entities to your builds; they can and will cause lag if you place too many in a relatively small area!

**SURVIVAL** - anchors and the rope tool can be crafted on the stonecutter in survival

BUG REPORTING - Please report any issues you find.

Textures are 32x32, mod is currently in beta.
Must be added to both client and server.


Contacts Discord - [Transcendent-Visions-Discord](https://discord.gg/5kH9AfeRD3) 

Patreon - [Elandria's Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/xElandriax)
